name: Protection

description: Open your heart to attract, deepen, and nurture romantic connection.

description: Attract prosperity, wealth, and opportunities into your life.

description: Support the body's natural healing processes and restore energetic balance.

name: Intuition
description: Strengthen your psychic abilities, inner knowing, and connection to higher wisdom.

description: Anchor your energy to the earth and find stability in times of chaos.

name: Creativity
description: Ignite inspiration, artistic expression, and innovative thinking.

name: Communication
description: Express yourself clearly, speak your truth, and improve understanding in relationships.

name: Courage
description: Build inner strength, overcome fear, and face challenges with confidence.

name: Peace & Calm
description: Quiet the mind, ease anxiety, and cultivate deep inner stillness.

description: Deepen your spiritual practice, expand consciousness, and connect to the divine.

name: Cleansing
description: Purify your energy field, space, and other crystals from accumulated negativity.

name: Self-Love

name: Transformation
description: Navigate major life changes, release old patterns, and embrace personal evolution.
